seed_problem: Themed grid network; remove at most k links to maximize the increase in s-t shortest path; checker verifies budget + connectivity and scores achieved delay.
mutation: goal+input: generalize the single s-t interdiction into MULTI-COMMODITY shortest-path interdiction over P priority-weighted demand pairs on a backbone-plus-heavy-shortcut arena mesh; maximize the weighted total lag while keeping every pair connected, so budget-k interdiction is NP-hard and greedy vs. best-improvement local search diverge.
title: Lag Storm: Arena Fiber Interdiction
strategies: do-nothing baseline: unplug no links (achieves the original weighted lag)
most-used-link greedy: repeatedly unplug the link carrying the most priority-weighted shortest-path traffic while keeping every pair connected
best-improvement local search: at each of k steps tentatively remove each candidate link, recompute the true weighted total lag for all pairs, and commit the removal with the largest gain
randomized multi-restart: perturb greedy choices across seeds and keep the interdiction set with the maximum weighted lag
